content: Fix backend crash: Move BaseModel import to top of server.py
Verify backend services running + sanity check Phase 4 endpoints with curl
Run testing agent for Phase 4 backend (Excel I/O, SMTP, Reset Pwd, Achievements, Ekstrakurikuler, E-Rapor)
Frontend A: Admin Excel Imports UI (template download + upload xlsx for 5 entities)
Frontend B: Admin SMTP Settings tab + Forgot/Reset Password pages
Frontend C: Modul Prestasi Siswa (Siswa submit + Wali Kelas/Admin verify + Galeri)
Frontend D: Modul Ekstrakurikuler (Coach kelola anggota, absensi, nilai)
Frontend E: E-Rapor Digital (Guru input nilai + Siswa/Admin lihat rapor)
Run frontend testing agent for full Phase 4 UI flows
